name: RZA
bio: RZA (Robert Fitzgerald Diggs) is the de facto leader and primary producer of the Wu-Tang Clan. Known as 'The Abbot,' he masterminded the group's sonic identity with dark, sample-heavy beats drawn from kung fu films, soul music, and raw street sounds.
facts: Produced all tracks on Wu-Tang's debut 'Enter the Wu-Tang (36 Chambers).'
Has scored multiple films including 'Kill Bill' and directed 'The Man with the Iron Fists.'
